title: Cryptool platform is live
content_html:
Cryptool is live.

After two years of development, the platform application is now open at cryptool.io. Sign up, explore the platform, and onboard friends and family through the referral program.

More modules are on the way over the coming weeks and months. This is just the beginning.
author: Cryptool
